meaning: n.包裹,<贬>一群,一副,背包,包装vt.包装,捆扎,塞满,压紧,挑选vi.包装货物,挤,群集,被包装 背包
examples: All joiners will receive a welcome pack.
She decided to pack in her job.
He picked up a six-pack of beer.
One massive hyena will finally break from the pack and plod up to take the meat.
But HP is hardly alone in its quest to pack cameras full of image-improving tools.
